initiation_judgment.basis: The August 13 sale-process decision followed updates on both stockholder activism and third-party bidder interest rather than a single stated trigger.
initiation_judgment.source_text: to receive an update on communications from stockholders and other interested parties, including Industry Participant. As a result of this meeting, the board (1) determined to explore strategic alternatives (including a possible sale of the Company)

advisor_wachtell_lipton.source_text: with Wachtell, Lipton, Rosen & Katz (“ Wachtell Lipton”), its legal advisor

advisor_jp_morgan.source_text: In July, after interviewing several potential financial advisors, the Company retained J. P. Morgan as financial advisor

count_reconciliation.assertion: 27 potential participants in a sale process
count_reconciliation.note: Extraction preserves the grouped 15-party NDA cohort, but the filing's 27 also includes three unnamed strategic parties and nine additional unnamed financial participants that were never individualized in the chronology.

count_reconciliation.assertion: approximately 15 parties had expressed interest in participating in the process
count_reconciliation.note: Counts match the grouped 15-party bidder cohort reflected in the October NDA event; the filing describes the figure as approximate.

count_reconciliation.assertion: 15 potentially interested financial buyers entered confidentiality and standstill agreements
count_reconciliation.note: Counts match exactly through grouped bidder_financial_buyers_15 and evt_006.

count_reconciliation.assertion: six of the potentially interested parties submitted indications of interest
count_reconciliation.note: Extraction individually grounds Buyer Group and Bidder 2's October 30 indications; four additional submitting parties were not individualized, including the unnamed bidder discussed in B019.

count_reconciliation.assertion: the four bidders that had indicated a price or range at or above $80.00 per share
count_reconciliation.note: Counts match after counting bidder_3's grouped actor as two underlying invitees alongside Buyer Group and Bidder 2.
